info.title: Csx Service

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description:
This section documents the webhook events triggered by the service.

To learn more about Webhooks configuration, see the [Webhooks Documentation](https://docs.janis.im/docs/webhook)

List Areas

Lists possible actions

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

AreaFilters.name: filters
AreaFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ClaimsFilters.name: filters
ClaimsFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

dateCreatedRange.description: A range for creation day. It will filter from 00:00Hs to 23:59:59Hs of the given range

slaDueDateRange.description: A range for SLA due date. It will filter from 00:00Hs to 23:59:59Hs of the given range

ClaimFilesFilters.name: filters
ClaimFilesFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ClaimItemsFilters.name: filters
ClaimItemsFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ClaimChannelsFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ClaimCompensationsFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

isPublic.description: Determinates if is a public compensation

ClaimHistoryFilters.name: filters
ClaimHistoryFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ClaimItemResolutionsFilters.name: filters
ClaimItemResolutionsFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ClaimManagementsFilters.name: filters
ClaimManagementsFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ClaimManagementStatusFilters.name: filters
ClaimManagementStatusFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ClaimMotivesFilters.name: filters
ClaimMotivesFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ClaimProcessesFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

status.description: The claim status transition status name

ClaimTypesFilters.name: filters
ClaimTypesFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

parent.description: The claim type parent id. (If "null" is sent, then it will filter by null)

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

repetitions.description: The times the customer has recalled about this claim

storeId.description:
The claim's store ID.
This refers to the `id` of the Commerce **Location**. See [Location](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Location)

escalated.description: Whether the claim is escalated or not

transitionId.description: The transition id to apply in claim

assigneeId.description: The user id to assign claim

items.description: An endpoint parameter to replace in the endpoint path or to send as data

name.description: The name of the path or data parameter

target.description: Where this parameter should be replaced.

static.description: Any static value you want to send

dynamic.description: The name of the property you want to get the value from

endpoint.description: The endpoint that should be called to execute the action

BaseAction.description: An action that can be executed

kind.description: A categorization of the action to help UI to group or organize the actions

icon.description: The icon code associated to the action

fields.description: The fields list that the user should see when executing this action

component.description: The component that should be used for the field

pathTarget.description: Relative or Absolute Path to a domain.

linkTarget.description: The target attribute specifies where to open the linked document

claimId.description: The ID of the Claim the item is related to

typeId.description: The ID of the Claim Item Type

orderId.description: This refers to the `id` of the OMS **Order**. See [Order](/v2/service/oms#tag/Orders)

comment.description: A comment provided by the user about the item

ClaimItemBatchItems.description: Multiple items to assign to Claim

itemId.description:
The [OMS Order](/v2/service/oms#tag/Orders) Item ID

**Important**: Items will be saved individually, with `type: 'item'` and field `itemId` as `typeId`

comment.description: A comment provided by the user about the item (specific for this item, if empty will use the one received in the request)

quantity.description: The item quantity (specific for this item, if empty will use the one received in the request)

price.description: The item price (specific for this item, if empty will use the one received in the request)

color.description: The color of the claim compensation

isPublic.description: Determinates if is a public compensation

changes.description: The list of changes in history

name.description: The name of the claim item resolution

description.description: The description of the claim item resolution.

shouldCreateOrder.description: Determinates if the claim item resolution should create orders.

shouldPickItem.description: Determinates if the claim item resolution should pick items.

shouldInvoicedItem.description: Determinates if the claim item resolution should invoiced items.

shouldGenerateCreditNote.description: Determinates if the claim item resolution should generate credit notes.

shouldGenerateCreditNote.description: Determinates if the claim item resolution should generate credit notes.

status.description: The status id of the claim item resolution
